official_functions.role: Construct the official Handshaking serverbound intention packet fixture
Write the official Handshaking serverbound intention body
Write the full Handshaking serverbound framed intention packet
Dispatch and decode the full Handshaking serverbound framed intention packet
Name the packet id assigned in Handshaking serverbound state
Read the decoded fields and terminal flag from the official packet instance

invariants: The official Handshaking serverbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the intention body.
The official Handshaking serverbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ClientIntentionPacket.
The decoded official ClientIntentionPacket preserves protocol version, host, port, and ClientIntent from the fixture.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded packet type, decoded fields, terminal flag, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove Login authentication, Configuration entry, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer Login authentication, Configuration entry, or client-load completion.
